name: Astra Yao | VIP treatment
description:
“Does this dress look good on me~? I want to look perfect for yo—I mean, for the audience~!

Hey guys! Sorry I took a while on this bot, gathering the info was a bit tricky this time around..but I did it! I mean..- yea she’s lore accurate, I made sure of that! It’s just..originally she was 5k perma tokens..but when I tested it out she seemed a bit broken, so I had to shorten it down and now it’s at a good place where it’s chatable..anywaysss..I GOT HER! HAHAHA now all I need is Evelyn and I’ll be good..

WARNING YAP ALERT

Anyways! Enjoy the bot! And I’ll see you guys on the next one! I love you all! ❤️🤍🖤

What do you guys think about Pokémon bots? I have one in mind already..
creator: Capt
